# Example Architecture Stub

A header that is missing both the `**Version**:` and `**Status**:` fields, so
the standards gate flags header-version-missing and header-status-missing. The
title line is a proper H1, so title-not-h1 does not fire here.

## 1. Body

This stub exists only to exercise the two missing-header errors in isolation,
keeping the richer ARCHITECTURE-NOTES fixture focused on the blob and warn
rules. It cites ENTITY-CORE-PROTOCOL §1 so it is not orphaned in topology.
